_validation_note: tMap join_mode/matching_mode/lookup_mode (and join-key operator) are nested under 'inputs' (MainInputCfg/LookupCfg/JoinKeyCfg) and are NOT enforced by this schema (the validator does not recurse into dict-typed keys) nor by the engine (map_config.validate_config only checks name/column/expression presence + the java bridge). The oracle/reference diff is the safety net. Valid values: join_mode {LEFT_OUTER_JOIN, INNER_JOIN}; matching_mode {UNIQUE_MATCH, FIRST_MATCH, ALL_MATCHES, ALL_ROWS}; lookup_mode {LOAD_ONCE, RELOAD, CACHE_OR_RELOAD}; operator {'='} only. See landmines tmap-join-mode-values / tmap-matching-mode-values / tmap-lookup-mode-values / tmap-operator-noop.
